title: Proclamation No. 408, s. 1965
text:
MALACAÑANG

RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 408

EXCLUDING FROM THE OPERATION OF PROCLAMATION NO. 63, DATED AUGUST 6, 1925, WHICH ESTABLISHED THE GOVERNMENT CENTER RESERVATION, SITUATED IN RESIDENCE SECTION “A”, CITY OF BAGUIO, ISLAND OF LUZON, A CERTAIN PORTION OF THE LAND EMBRACED THEREIN, AND RESERVING THE SAME FOR BUILDING SITE PURPOSES OF THE SOCIAL SECURITY SYSTEM.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, Diosdado Macapagal, President of the Philippines, do hereby exclude from operation of Proclamation No. 63, dated August 6, 1925, which established the Government Center Reservation situated in Residence Section “A”, City of Baguio, Island of Luzon, a certain portion of the land embraced therein and reserve the same for building site purposes under the administration of the Administrator of the Social Security System, subject to private rights, if any there be, which parcel of land is more particularly described as follows, to wit:

Nr-174 (Social Security System)

“A parcel of land (as shown on plan Nr-174, L.R.C. Record No. ——-), situated in the Res. Sec. “A”, City of Baguio. Bounded on the NW., along line 1-2, by Harrison Road; on the N., along line 2-3, by property of Busa Cerantes; on the NE., along line 3-4, by property of Bureau of Forestry; oil the E., along line 4-5, by property of Bureau of Mines; on the S., along line 5-6, by property of Benguet, Ifugao, Bontoc, Apayao, Kalinga (Lot 2, Swo-19505 (Portion); and on the NW., along line 6-1,-by Harrison Road. Beginning at a point marked “I” on plan, being N. 12 deg. 07 min. W., 458.64 meters from Triangulation Station “Happy”, Baguio Townsite, thence N. 38 deg. 47 min. E., 25.81 meters to point 2;. thence N. 77 deg. 18 min. E., 34.96 meters to point 3; thence S. 62 deg. 45 min. E., 36.34 meters to point 4; thence S. 3 deg. 01 min. W., 19.94 meters to point 5; thence S. 87 deg. 56 min. W., 91.79 meters to point 6; thence N. 40 deg. 16 min. E. 15.78 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of 2,500 square meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground as follows points I and 2 by Spikes on Trees, point 3 by Cross marked on Cone. Pavement and the rest by B.L. Cyl. Cone. Mons.; bearings true, date of survey, March 27, 1962. Date approved, Nov. 13, 1963.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 16th day of June, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty-five.

DIOSDADO MACAPAGAL President of the Philippines

By the President: RAMON A. DIAZ Executive Secretary

Source: University of the Philippines, College of Law Library
